positive: A symmetrical and aesthetically balanced composition featuring a whimsical, stylized forest scene at dusk. The main subject is a group of bioluminescent woodland animals (foxes, rabbits, deer) gathered around a gently glowing, stylized campfire. The overall color palette should be deep indigo, vibrant teal, emerald green, and warm amber, creating a magical contrast. Use a vector illustration or clean watercolor aesthetic, ensuring strong, defined silhouettes and high contrast for excellent print reproduction. Focus on clean lines, magical realism, and a central focal point. The style should be suitable for textile printing, maximizing visual impact.
negative: blurry, fuzzy, text, logo, watermark, cropped, deformed, extra limbs, bad anatomy, ugly, noise, grain, artifact, jpeg artifacts, low detail, photorealistic
